overall.description: First-person gameplay footage walking through an industrial waterfront district, transitioning from a warehouse corridor to an open plaza with a docked cruise ship at Aloha Tower Market, then approaching luxury mega yachts at the harbor. The environment features tropical vegetation, modern port buildings, and large vessels under bright midday sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial warehouse corridor between storage buildings

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the paved corridor between white warehouse buildings on the left and covered parking structure on the right

entered.detail: single-story white metal warehouses with roll-up doors running along the left side
long covered structure with multiple bays on the right side
tall orange residential building with multiple balconies visible in the distance
tall stone clock tower with pointed roof visible in the distance ahead

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person walk through a narrow industrial corridor between warehouse buildings. White industrial warehouses line the left side while a covered parking structure runs along the right. In the distance, an orange apartment block and a prominent clock tower are visible against the clear blue sky. The area is completely empty of people or vehicles.

scene_state.functional_zone: open waterfront plaza at Aloha Tower Market with cruise ship docked

events.description: exits narrow warehouse corridor into open plaza revealing the Aloha Tower Market and large cruise ship

agents.ego_description: continuing forward as the environment opens up to reveal the waterfront and docked cruise ship

entered.detail: massive white cruise liner with blue accents docked at the harbor
large white text overlay reading 'ALOHA TOWER MARKET' appearing briefly on screen
tropical palm trees scattered around the plaza area

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions from the enclosed warehouse corridor to a wide-open waterfront plaza. The 'ALOHA TOWER MARKET' text appears as a massive white cruise ship comes into view on the right, docked at the harbor. The orange apartment building and clock tower shift to the left as the camera advances toward the open waterfront area with tropical palm trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront dock with luxury mega yachts moored at pier

events.description: camera turns slightly left toward the waterfront to approach the docked mega yachts

agents.ego_description: turning toward the waterfront and approaching the massive luxury yachts docked at the pier

entered.detail: two enormous luxury yachts with sleek silver hulls moored side by side at the dock
low-rise terminal building with green roof and arched windows along the waterfront

segments.scene_description: The camera turns toward the waterfront, leaving the cruise ship behind and approaching two massive luxury mega yachts docked at the pier. The orange apartment building falls behind as the clock tower shifts to the right side of the frame. The scene focuses on the sleek yachts and the waterfront terminal building as the camera moves closer to the water's edge.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a confined industrial corridor into a sprawling, sunlit waterfront plaza. It begins by navigating a narrow passage between white warehouses and a covered parking structure, with a distant orange apartment block and clock tower framing the clear blue sky. As the camera advances, the enclosed space opens up into the Aloha Tower Market, where the environment expands to reveal a massive white cruise ship docked to the right and tropical palm trees lining the way. The scene then shifts toward the water's edge, leaving the cruise ship behind as the clock tower moves to the right of the frame. Finally, the camera approaches the pier to focus on two sleek luxury mega yachts docked beside the waterfront terminal building.
